name: Bonus Package
description: A Torgue MIRV grenade that keeps splitting into more explosives, covering a broad area in chained blasts. It is excellent for clearing groups, and in tight spaces the overlapping detonations can slam the same target multiple times for heavy damage.
notes:
It can spawn with any delivery type. Boom and Bewm drop it, making it one of the easier legendary grenade mods to farm.

Its Seraph counterpart, Meteor Shower, usually throws out more submunitions for higher total damage in a tighter area. A bit of fuse time helps reduce self-damage, while homing, sticky homing, and rubberised versions can be especially dangerous at close range.

special.description: Each child grenade creates another child grenade when it detonates, increasing both total damage and area coverage.
special.title: 2x more awesome, bonus extreme!
